findings.problem: Major reversals (federal intake alignment, Deshawn's release, and formal dual-track opening) arrive as a rapid phone-call cascade with minimal on-page resistance, so consequence feels announced rather than fought for. This compresses causal struggle at the exact moment the chapter should show institutional drag.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the diner escalation anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:313, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:331, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:387, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:451 so each outcome is preceded by a concrete obstacle and a visible counteraction. Keep the same end state, but add at least one failed or delayed step before Deshawn's release and before Turner confirms dual-track opening.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:313, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:331, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:387, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:451 shows at least two specific institutional blockers (for example chain challenge, timestamp dispute, judge hesitation) and links each major outcome to an on-page action that overcomes a blocker; FAIL if outcomes still land as uninterrupted declarative calls.

findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the chapter treats Deshawn's wrongful-detention release as reported information and quippy aftermath instead of rendering embodied consequence. A high-cost human event is reduced to phone summary at the payoff beat.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand the release beat anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:389, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:391, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:397, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:403 with an on-page consequence moment (direct call from Deshawn or immediate physical encounter) that includes bodily/emotional specificity and one material aftereffect of detention, while preserving pacing into the affidavit turn.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised text anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:389, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:391, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:397, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:403 includes direct sensory evidence of Deshawn's post-release state (voice, breathing, movement, or visible condition) plus one concrete detention consequence (medical, legal, or social) observed in-scene; FAIL if release remains only secondhand report.

findings.problem: Voice separation thins in the federal-call passages: Mara, Lena, Nguyen, and Turner converge into similar legal-procedural syntax, creating transcript cadence and reducing idiolect contrast under pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise call dialogue anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:329, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:337, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:451, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:455 so each speaker carries distinct rhythm/register: Mara with fast evidence-attribution pivots, Lena shifting from procedural stack to compact blunt lines, Turner with cautious qualifiers then hard directives.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if in revised dialogue anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:329, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:337, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:451, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:455 each of Mara, Lena, and Turner has at least one line that is recognizably character-specific in syntax/rhythm without speaker tags, and no 3-line run reads as interchangeable legal boilerplate; FAIL otherwise.

findings.problem: Recurring construction tic: narrator repeatedly characterizes voices with 'X sounded ...' scaffolding. At five uses in one chapter, the pattern becomes mechanical and flattens sentence texture.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:269, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:271, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:327, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:391, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:455, replace most 'sounded' shortcuts with concrete behavior, timing, breath, or physical detail so voice quality is inferred rather than labeled.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised cited spans contain no more than two narrator-level 'sounded' voice-descriptor constructions and each replaced instance adds an observable cue (gesture, pacing, breath, interruption, or room interaction); FAIL if three or more such constructions remain.

summary: Chapter 17 delivers strong immediate scene pressure at Bell Creek, but it does not yet sustain Booker-level consequence through the payoff run: institutional reversals are over-compressed, Deshawn's release is sanitized into reported summary, call-scene dialogue voices converge, and a repeated prose formula flattens texture.
